context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies the bottleneck decision tree (CTR below benchmark → creative problem), uses the specific scale/pause criteria (≥50 conversions, frequency < 2.5, spending < 30% budget), structures the report with all required sections, and saves to the correct path.

checklist.name: Correct output file path
checklist.description: Report is written to ads-reports/2026-05-12.md (matching ads-reports/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md pattern)

checklist.name: TL;DR section
checklist.description: Report opens with a TL;DR section summarizing total spend, total conversions, CPA, ROAS, best variant, and biggest issue in 2-3 sentences

checklist.name: Headline metrics table
checklist.description: Report includes a headline metrics table with at least 5 of: Spend, Impressions, CTR, CPC, Conversions, CPA, ROAS — with comparison to prior period or industry benchmarks

checklist.name: CTR bottleneck diagnosis
checklist.description: Report applies the CTR diagnosis: for the two prospecting ad sets (CTR 0.70% and 0.75%, both below the 1.0% benchmark) the report identifies the problem as creative/hook quality

checklist.name: What's working section
checklist.description: Report includes a 'What's working' section identifying Cart Abandoners ad set as performing well (ROAS 5.12x, CPA $19.57 well below $45 target)

checklist.name: What's breaking section
checklist.description: Report includes a 'What's breaking' section identifying the prospecting ad sets as underperforming with specific metrics and root cause

checklist.name: Scale recommendation with threshold justification
checklist.description: Report recommends scaling Cart Abandoners and cites specific threshold criteria justifying the scale decision (e.g., conversions at/below target CPA, frequency < 2.5 or similar)

checklist.name: Pause recommendation with threshold justification
checklist.description: Report recommends pausing or adjusting underperforming ad sets with specific threshold-based reasoning (e.g., cost-per-conversion vs CPA target, insufficient conversions)

checklist.name: Scaling decision section
checklist.description: Report includes a dedicated 'Scaling decision' section with a clear yes/no for each ad set and supporting numbers

checklist.name: Prioritized recommendations (P0/P1/P2)
checklist.description: Report includes recommendations organized by priority tier (P0/P1/P2 or equivalent)

checklist.name: Open questions or next steps
checklist.description: Report includes an 'Open questions' or equivalent section listing things to investigate or get from the team
